message:
style(storage/health): collapse two format! macros to single-line per rustfmt

Why
---
Two `format!(...)` calls inside `database_stats` were authored
with manually broken multi-line argument layouts that exceed the
project's rustfmt configuration's preferred form. rustfmt now
collapses them onto single lines because both fit comfortably
under the line-width budget. Bringing the file in line with
`cargo fmt` keeps CI silent and prevents whitespace-only diffs
from showing up the next time someone touches this file for an
actual logic change.

What
----
- `crates/frankenterm-core/src/storage/health.rs`:
  - `StorageError::Database(format!("database_stats: event-types
    prepare failed: {err}"))` — was four lines, now one line.
  - `StorageError::Database(format!("database_stats: event-types
    query failed: {err}"))` — was four lines, now one line.

Both are inside the same map_err closure pattern; the format
argument and the resulting error are byte-identical. No
non-whitespace tokens changed.

Verification: `cargo fmt --check` against this commit produces
no output for this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
